Name: Star Citizen Stream Deck
Description:
Plugin that provides bindable actions for Star Citizen via Stream Deck.
This Plugin is not endorsed by or affiliated with the Cloud Imperium or Roberts Space Industries group of companies. Status.NoInstallationDetected: No installation detected. Set custom path.

FunctionAction.PageTitle: Star Citizen Stream Deck Plugin PI - Adaptive Key

ToggleAction.PageTitle: Star Citizen Stream Deck Plugin PI - Toggle Key
ToggleAction.ResetTooltip: Hold duration (seconds) to flip state without executing the binding.

DialAction.PageTitle: Star Citizen Stream Deck Plugin PI - Adaptive Dial
DialAction.RotateLeftHint: Executed once for each tick when the dial rotates left.
DialAction.RotateRightHint: Executed once for each tick when the dial rotates right.
DialAction.PushHint: Uses the action activation mode while the dial is pressed and released.

ControlPanel.PageTitle: Star Citizen Stream Deck Plugin PI - Control Panel
ControlPanel.Title: Control Panel
ControlPanel.CustomPathsHelp: Set per-channel overrides by selecting the corresponding Data.p4k.
ControlPanel.FactoryResetConfirm:
Factory Reset will remove cached installations, clear all custom Data.p4k overrides, reset theme selection, and rebuild keybindings from scratch.
